properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is too wise to ever be mistaken God is too good to ever be unkind God is too faithful to ever break His promise When I can't trace His hand I'll trust in His heart every time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the waiting God is working Working all things for my good In the waiting I will worship 'Til the breakthrough comes So don't fear my soul be still and know He's always in control In the waiting God is working for my good

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God is too strong I've never seen Him shaken God is too big He'll never fear the fight God is too truthful He'll never be dishonest If He gave me His word That's all that I need through the night

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the waiting God is working for my good

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For all of my days He orders my steps I trust in the God who knows what's best In meadows of green or shadows of death I trust in the God who knows what's best In loss or in gain I know that I'm blessed I trust in the God who knows what's best There's joy on the way and wonders ahead I trust in the God who knows (what's best)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I trust in the God who knows what's best I trust in the God who knows what's best
